Dialog.name: MSG_707_100
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 1 0 6}The Fortune Arcana... is gone!? The Strength Arcana must have done something![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_707_110
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 2 0 6}There's no way to attack it now. You'll have to defeat the Strength Arcana first![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_707_210
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 3 0 6}That roulette... It looks like wherever it stops, it will activate a different effect![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_707_200
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 4 0 6}Red hurts, and blue helps... Allies and enemies—it doesn't discriminate![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_707_220
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 8 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 5 0 6}Where it stops is random, and I can't predict it. But... either way, be careful![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_707_002
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 5 -1 -1 0 0}An attack left to fate, targeting both friend and foe... Can that still be called an attack?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_707_003
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 5 -1 -1 0 0}The Strength Arcana seems confident in its power. Don't be fooled by its appearance![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_707_300
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 8 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 6 0 6}Strength has been defeated! I can detect Fortune's presence again![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_707_005
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 -1 0 0}I have a really bad feeling about this roulette board...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_707_410
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 9 0 4}A misfire, huh? I've had enough of gambling with fate. Let's take it down![n]{f 1 1}
